skill1.kitLine: Activates at the start of Full Burst.
Affects all allies who previously used their Burst Skills.
skill1.note: Per-chain membership; engine resets burstCasters/nonBurstCasters at FB end.

skill1.kitLine: ATK ▲ 64.51% of the skill user's ATK for 15 sec.
skill1.note: casterAtkPct = % of Crown's ATK, not target's own ATK. Fixed in 2026-07-16 rebuild.

skill1.kitLine: Affects all allies who did not previously use their Burst Skills.
skill1.note: Disjoint from burstCasters — no unit receives both blocks.

skill1.kitLine: DEF ▲ 37.44% of the skill user's DEF for 15 sec.
skill1.note: DEF is damage-inert in the sim; modeled for completeness. Value is % of Crown's DEF (casterDef semantics).

skill2.kitLine: Activates after 43 normal attacks. Affects self.
skill2.note: Aggregated: 43 attacks/stack × 20 stacks = 860 hits per heal cycle. Per-stack cadence not separately modeled; timing is equivalent.

skill2.kitLine: Relax: Incoming healing ▲ 4.06% continuously. Stacks up to 20 times.
skill2.note: Defensive stat (incoming healing buff). No DPS impact; dropped deliberately.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when Relax is at max stacks. Removes stacks and affects self.
skill2.note: The 860-hit counter IS the max-stacks condition (43×20). Stack removal is implicit in counter reset.
Defensive; no DPS impact; single-boss sim has no taunt/aggro model.

skill2.kitLine: Attract: Taunts all enemies for 5 sec.
skill2.note: Defensive; partless single-boss sim — taunt is inert.

skill2.kitLine: Restores HP equal to 5.23% of the skill user's final Max HP.
skill2.note: Heal event emitted to self (no HP value — no HP pool in sim). The event is the trigger for the recovery block below. Actual HP amount is immaterial.

skill2.kitLine: Activates when recovery takes effect. Affects all allies.
skill2.note: Fires whenever Crown RECEIVES a heal (self-Relax or external healer). Corrected 2026-07-14 from fixed-cadence to heal-triggered.
Team-wide AD buff. Uptime depends on heal frequency: ~27% off self-Relax alone, near-permanent with a frequent healer.

burst.kitLine: Creates a Shield equal to 10.45% of the skill user's final Max HP for 15 sec.
burst.note: No HP pool modeled; shield event fires 'shielded' triggers for shield-synergy kits but does not track shield HP or absorb damage.

documentedConfounds.text: Relax: Incoming healing ▲ 4.06% continuously. Stacks up to 20 times.
documentedConfounds.why: Defensive stat; no DPS impact in the sim.

documentedConfounds.text: Attract: Taunts all enemies for 5 sec.
documentedConfounds.why: Partless single-boss sim; taunt is inert.

documentedConfounds.text: DEF buff (37.44% of Crown's DEF) is damage-inert in the sim — DEF does not enter the damage formula.
documentedConfounds.why: DEF has no DPS contribution; modeled for completeness only.

documentedConfounds.text: Shield has no HP pool — fires 'shielded' triggers but does not absorb damage or track shield HP.
documentedConfounds.why: Shield-synergy triggers fire correctly; shield HP is irrelevant in a partless DPS sim.

documentedConfounds.text: S2 Relax cycle aggregated to 860-hit counter (43×20) rather than modeling per-stack Relax accumulation.
documentedConfounds.why: Timing is equivalent (860 hits = 43×20); the per-stack incoming-healing buff is UNMODELED anyway, so no intermediate state matters.

documentedConfounds.text: S2 +20.99% AD is heal-triggered (recovery event), not fixed-cadence. In healer-less teams ~27% uptime off self-Relax; with frequent healer near-permanent.
documentedConfounds.why: If external healer frequency is under-modeled in a comp, the recovery trigger fires less often than real → team AD buff uptime too low → sim under-predicts. Corrected 2026-07-14; now matches real kit.

documentedConfounds.text: S1 casterAtkPct uses Crown's ATK (not target's own ATK). Fixed 2026-07-16 from a parser mis-parse that applied % of each target's own ATK.
documentedConfounds.why: Fixed and verified; the old bug would have been HOT (over-buff). Current encoding is kit-exact.

documentedConfounds.text: S1 burst casters vs non-casters are disjoint groups; engine resets membership at FB end so it is per-chain.
documentedConfounds.why: Matches real kit structure; no unit receives both 44.35% reload lines.

authorIntentSummary: The override models Crown's full DPS-relevant kit: S1 disjoint caster/non-caster buffs at Full Burst enter (casterAtkPct + reloadSpeed for casters, defPct + reloadSpeed for non-casters), S2 Relax-cycle heal event every 860 hits triggering a team-wide +20.99% AD buff on any recovery event (self or external healer), and burst team AD + shield event. Defensive lines (incoming healing buff, invulnerable, taunt) are deliberately dropped as inert in a partless single-boss DPS sim. The key approximation is the 860-hit aggregate for the Relax cycle and the heal-triggered (not fixed-cadence) recovery buff, both corrected and verified as of 2026-07-16. Board shows N=12, mean 1.028, MAD 0.050 — solidly OK band.
